fields.label: Reference DocType
fields.description: The DocType this SEO metadata applies to (e.g., SKU Product, Product Category)

fields.label: Reference Document
fields.description: The specific document this SEO metadata applies to

fields.label: Reference Title
fields.description: Auto-filled from reference document

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Whether this SEO metadata is active

fields.label: Tenant
fields.description: Auto-filled from reference document for tenant isolation

fields.label: Tenant Name
fields.description: Auto-filled from Tenant

fields.label: Meta Title
fields.description: Title tag for search engines (recommended: 50-60 characters)

fields.label: Meta Description
fields.description: Description for search results (recommended: 150-160 characters)

fields.label: Meta Keywords
fields.description: Comma-separated keywords (optional, limited SEO impact)

fields.label: Canonical URL
fields.description: Preferred URL for this page to avoid duplicate content issues

fields.label: OG Title
fields.description: Title for social media shares (falls back to meta title)

fields.label: OG Description
fields.description: Description for social media shares (falls back to meta description)

fields.label: OG Image
fields.description: Image for social media shares (recommended: 1200x630 pixels)

fields.label: OG Type
fields.description: Open Graph object type

fields.label: Twitter Card Type
fields.description: Type of Twitter card to display

fields.label: Twitter Title
fields.description: Title for Twitter cards (falls back to OG title)

fields.label: Twitter Description
fields.description: Description for Twitter cards (falls back to OG description)

fields.label: Twitter Image
fields.description: Image for Twitter cards (falls back to OG image)

fields.label: Allow Indexing
fields.description: Allow search engines to index this page

fields.label: Allow Follow Links
fields.description: Allow search engines to follow links on this page

fields.label: Additional Robots Directives
fields.description: Additional directives like noarchive, nosnippet, max-snippet:150

fields.label: Include in Sitemap
fields.description: Include this page in XML sitemap

fields.label: Sitemap Priority
fields.description: Priority hint for search engines (0.0 to 1.0)

fields.label: Change Frequency
fields.options:
always
hourly
daily
weekly
monthly
yearly
never
fields.description: How frequently the page content is likely to change

fields.label: Schema Type
fields.options:
Product
Organization
BreadcrumbList
FAQPage
Article
WebPage
Custom
fields.description: Primary Schema.org type for structured data

fields.label: Schema Data (JSON-LD)
fields.description: Additional Schema.org structured data in JSON-LD format
